phases.intro_dialogue: Tickroot rewinds the old prototype pattern.

niggesh_nishal_boss.bullet_legend: Berry invoices, fryer baskets, and false-chicken tells.
niggesh_nishal_boss.pacing_note: The first two phases teach falling and lane attacks before Nishal sweeps the kitchen clean.

phases.intro_dialogue: Nishal throws fake invoices and berry baskets.
phases.readability_hint: Red stains mark the falling columns; clean bark remains safe.

patterns.safe_hint: Invoices fall from red-stained columns. Stand beneath clean bark.

phases.intro_dialogue: The chef hut fills with red berry splashes.
phases.readability_hint: Each berry lane glows before it splashes across the floor.

patterns.safe_hint: Berry lanes flash before they splash. Hold the clean lane.

phases.intro_dialogue: Nishal swings the empty fryer basket through the whole clearing.
phases.readability_hint: The basket rattles at the edge before reversing its sweep.

patterns.safe_hint: The fryer sweep reverses once. Cross behind the basket.

ankit_boss.bullet_legend: Empty plates, food rage, and volatile berry potion splashes.
ankit_boss.pacing_note: Ankit escalates from readable plate rings into a mixed forest-food storm.

phases.intro_dialogue: Ankit attacks with empty plates and betrayed appetite.
phases.readability_hint: Every plate ring has one chipped gap that stays open while it expands.

patterns.safe_hint: The plate ring has one chipped gap. Follow it outward.

phases.intro_dialogue: Ankit flips a whole dinner service into the mist.
phases.readability_hint: Place shadows settle on the floor before the plates arrive.

patterns.safe_hint: Plates mark their landing spots. Keep moving between settings.

phases.intro_dialogue: Berry potions splash across the forest path and wake every old attack at once.
phases.readability_hint: Potion color identifies the recalled pattern before it activates.

patterns.safe_hint: Potion flashes announce the next recalled pattern. Read the color, then move.
